The AI2 Olmo project, developed by the Allen Institute for Artificial Intelligence (Ai2), focuses on creating open, transparent, and accessible language models. The goal is to advance natural language processing research by providing publicly available model weights, training data, and documentation, enabling the broader research community to study, improve, and build upon these models.
